comment: Component-wide typecheck config: covers core/, gemini/, and the dispatcher + its test. Extends tsconfig.base.json for the shared strictness settings. Third-party type packages (@types/bun, @google/genai) are installed under gemini/node_modules (the only dir with package.json / SDK deps), so typeRoots points there. PRECONDITION: run `bun install` in gemini/ first, and run `bunx tsc --noEmit` from THIS dir (vendor-clients/). The gemini/ dir also has its own tsconfig for typechecking that vendor in isolation.
